summary: Verified KnowledgeBase page loads with all 10 tracks (no compile errors / stack overflow), and DeepTopicPage now correctly hydrates Prerequisites + Related sections. Backend + frontend tests all pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth uses session cookies (not bearer tokens). Login response returns user object; token is set as an HttpOnly cookie. Any future test/utility using Authorization: Bearer will fail with 401 — document this or expose an /api/auth/token endpoint for machine clients.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session-based auth: use requests.Session() and POST /api/auth/login; cookies are then attached. Backend endpoints verified: GET /api/roadmap/nodes/{id} returns prerequisites[] and related[] with id/label. Nodes tested: dsa.foundations.arrays.kadane (4 related, 0 prereqs — expected), dsa.foundations.arrays.prefix_sum (1 prereq Traversal + 6 related), dsa.foundations.arrays.traversal (6 related via reverse-prereq incl. kadane/prefix_sum/diff_array/matrix). AI content generation POST /api/roadmap/nodes/java.exceptions.core/content/generate returns 200 with theory/examples/tips/flashcards. Settings ai_config.model = gemini-flash-latest visible in Settings > AI Configuration tab dropdown.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — the reported empty Related/Prerequisites cards were caused by empty backend data (fixed by _auto_link_related in generate_roadmap.py which populated 1008/1011 leaf nodes). Verified live data hydration and UI rendering of both sections. Frontend flat KnowledgeBase.jsx renders 10 tracks without recursion errors.
verified_flows: Login via /login with admin@prepos.io works, redirects to /app/mission-control
Knowledge Base /app/knowledge-base loads with all 10 tracks (DSA, Java, LLD, HLD, OS, DBs, Networks, Projects, Behavioral, Resume)
DeepTopicPage /app/knowledge-base/nodes/dsa.foundations.arrays.kadane renders with Related pills: Traversal & In-Place Ops, Prefix Sum, Difference Array, 2-D Matrix Basics
DeepTopicPage prefix_sum: Prereq = Traversal & In-Place Ops. Related = Difference Array, Subarray Sum Equals K, Segment Tree/Fenwick, Traversal, Kadane's Algorithm, 2-D Matrix Basics
Clicking a related link (Difference Array) correctly navigates to /app/knowledge-base/nodes/dsa.foundations.arrays.diff_array
Settings > AI Configuration shows Model dropdown pre-selected with gemini-flash-latest
